raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues and proposes tighter framings, partially supported by evidence from the text.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (CAMEL) but does not articulate a clear delta or map against multiple works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing citations but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims and provides evidence to support its critiques.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., over-stated claims).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues and proposes tighter framings, partially supported by evidence from the text.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (CAMEL) but does not articulate a clear delta or map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims and provides evidence to support its critiques.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., over-stated claims).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
